items.name_en: Size: 16*26*9cm. CHANEL Overseas Channel Stock 19 Series Goatskin Flap Bag. The CHANEL 19 bag is the last design Karl Lagerfeld participated in before his passing. It features enlarged classic quilting and a chain strap design, retaining the classic while upgrading practicality and comfort! The name '19' comes from time, just like the 2.55, so you know it was born in 2019. It also covers Coco Chanel's birthday. Imported goatskin, fine and soft texture, feels fluffy when held.
items.name_cn: Size: 16*26*9cm. CHANEL Overseas Channel Stock 19 Series Goatskin Flap Bag. The CHANEL 19 bag is the last design Karl Lagerfeld participated in before his passing. Size: 17×16×7cm
CHANEL Overseas Channel Exclusive❗️ Calfskin Bucket Bag, CHANEL SS23 Bucket Bag. In addition to being more compact than the 22 model, the "gemstones" and logo pendants on the chain offer more refined details compared to the modern urban aesthetic, especially perfect for vacation and matching with solid colors or tonal looks.

items.name_en: Small 🍠🍠🍠 High-body Backpack! 'Milk White' (Export Product) OHANEL🚩🚩🚩 25B Clover Series Backpack 🎒 If you like backpacks, don't miss this one 🌟 Square and structured shape; HAAs calfskin with a sand gold texture √ Clover medal pendant with a strong vintage feel! Overall style is very 'Academic' ❤️❤️ Rich vintage feel, sweet and cool yet retro! Whether carried by hand or on the shoulder, it's a styling essential! Size: 22x19.5x7cm

items.name_en: Small 30cm (Black) OHANEL🚩🔮🔮25C Bucket Drawstring Bag! A new little cutie added to the Chanel series, deer suede. Its body is actually a small bucket bag, the leather is soft matte suede 🐂 Can fit some cute mini earphone cases 🎧, looks like a carefully curated outfit. Large Double C logo design, can be adjusted! Charming details, ⛓ chain is non-adjustable, vintage gold hardware, has a strong vintage vibe 👅 Can't help but praise this piece ✨ Style: 99921 Size: 30x 26x 14

items.name_en: Small Size "Export Product" 🚩🚩🚩 Top quality, price is a bit high 😯 OHANEL 🔮🔮🔮 25A Grained Handle Mailer Bag. A versatile style that is both sweet and salty, combining looks and practicality, mastering that relaxed and expensive look 🤏🏻. Grained calfskin 🐂 very durable, retro matte gold hardware. Capacity fits daily items 👍🏻. Larger than previous flap bags 😌. Has a handle for hand carrying, and a short leather chain strap, which can be worn as an accessory or on the shoulder. Size: 15.5*22*6cm/5147001180

items.name_en: Small Size 🚩🚩🚩 CHANEL 25P Chaebol Heiress Look Summer New Vacation Item The double-C buckle is ceramic, very exquisite and elegant, suitable for many occasions. Horse lovers are falling in love with Chanel again ~ 🎖️🎖️🎖️ Black with white 🐻‍❄️ color CF Cherry Blossom Season ~ As if the season of cherry blossoms turned into a bag, wow ~ Every part of the bag 💖 reveals the breath of spring. The atmospheric styling is like a girl's cheek, 🤩 gentle and charming ~ Simply carrying it can emit a sweet yet elegant princess temperament. She is simply a healing existence, making every day of girls 👧 full of sweetness and gentleness la la! Small Size: 12.5 X 19.5 X 3.5 CM

items.name_en: Small Size 18cm "High-end Quality Customization" 🚩🚩🚩 Exclusive Custom Release, Upgraded New OHANEL 24K Autumn/Winter New Makeup Bag 🆕 The makeup bag is a popular style favored by Chanel. Elegant and noble, it can serve as a vintage makeup box for various collections. The body features a double C logo, full of vintage retro style, and the capacity is huge. The shape is structured and suitable for various occasions. It can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody! It also features an automatic lock, all-steel 14k pale gold buckle, and imported sheepskin~ soft to the touch and worth buying, looking noble everywhere! Official website sync: 12.5 X 18 X 6.5 cm
